principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Military HUD precision with SaaS usability.
Emotion First: The user is an Operator. The UI must feel reliable, fast, and precise.
Content is King: Data is the hero. No decorative fluff. Every pixel serves the signal.
Zoom In: High density data, but clear hierarchy.
Negative Space: Use it to group functional areas, not just for aesthetics.

gradients.none: Avoid gradients. Use solid colors and 1px borders for definition.

structure.header: h-16 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-50

cards.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-none md:rounded-sm shadow-none

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700 rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-sm text-zinc-200 placeholder:text-zinc-600

tables.header: bg-zinc-900/50 text-zinc-500 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-zinc-800

map.marker_style: CircleMarker with radius 6, fillOpacity 0.8, stroke width 1

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on background (optional, use opacity 0.02)

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Tactical Minimalism' theme. Avoid rounded corners > 4px.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' or standard monospace for all numerical data (RSSI, SNR, SF, Coordinates).
The Map is the centerpiece. Ensure it takes up significant screen real estate on the Dashboard.
For the Heatmap: Use the SF color coding strictly (Green=SF7-8, Orange=SF9-10, Red=SF11-12).
Gateways and Devices pages should use dense data tables.
Import CSV feature must parse: DevEUI, Name, Latitude, Longitude.
Ensure the Webhook endpoint is clearly documented or simulated in the UI logs.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Device Imported', 'Gateway Updated').
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid Zinc-950.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids.
Create depth through z-index hierarchy, not heavy shadows.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable inside containers, but keep data dense.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
